# Security.MetadataConveysAuthority method

Returns `false` — metadata MUST NOT be a source of authority (spec §28.9, R-28.9-a; AC-44.23). Unconditional, so a caller cannot accidentally derive authority from a metadata field.

```csharp
public static bool MetadataConveysAuthority()
```

## Return Value

Always `false`.
